sources.name: MHCLG Revenue Outturn Time Series
sources.note: England: Revenue Outturn multi-year dataset v3.1, values in £ thousands

sources.name: Scottish Local Government Finance Statistics
sources.note: Scotland: Net revenue expenditure by service and council, 2023-24, £ thousands

sources.name: StatsWales Revenue Outturn
sources.note: Wales: Revenue outturn expenditure by authority and service, £ thousands

sources.name: NI Local Government Auditor's Report 2025
sources.note: Northern Ireland: per-council expenditure by service, 2023-24, £ millions real terms. NI councils have narrower service responsibilities than GB (no education, social care, housing, health, roads).

authorities.note: Per-authority net current expenditure by service, £ thousands. England: upper-tier authorities (county councils, unitary authorities, metropolitan districts, London boroughs). Scotland: 32 councils. Wales: 22 unitary authorities. Northern Ireland: 11 councils (narrower service responsibilities, no education/social care/housing/health/roads).
